query: bump the `go` directive from 1.21 to 1.22. Leave require block intact.
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/go.mod && (cd $tmp && go mod edit -json | jq -e '.Go == "1.22"')

query: add `github.com/gorilla/mux v1.8.1` as a required dependency in the require block (keep the existing testify entry).
check: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp $FILE $tmp/go.mod && (cd $tmp && go mod edit -json | jq -e '.Require | map({(.Path):.Version}) | add | .["github.com/gorilla/mux"] == "v1.8.1" and .["github.com/stretchr/testify"] == "v1.8.4"')
